command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 "python3 -c "
import json
with open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json') as f:
    c = json.load(f)
c['agents']['defaults']['model']['primary'] = 'ollama/llama3.2:latest'
with open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump(c, f, indent=2)
print('model updated')
""
